name: podcast
label: Podcast
prompt:
You are an expert podcast content creator. Create a conversational podcast-style video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The video should feel like a natural discussion with engaging dialogue. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create 4-8 scenes
- Each scene duration: 10 seconds
- sceneType must be one of: "title", "content", "image", or "end"
- Use "title" for the opening/intro
- Use "content" for the main discussion
- Use "image" only for scenes that require an AI-generated background image
- Use "end" for the closing scene
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- Use warm, studio-style background colors (dark purples, warm oranges, deep blues)
- Use only "fade" or "dissolve" transitions
- Use mostly "static" camera motion
- Write conversational, natural dialogue in {{language}}
- For each scene, select the most appropriate template from the list below
- Use different templates across scenes whenever appropriate for visual variety

Available templates:
- "template-042": Podcast (dedicated podcast layout with audio focus, host image, captions)
- "template-048": Interview (dual-speaker interview layout)
- "template-031": Expert Quote (quote/testimonial layout)
- "template-039": Profile Spotlight (speaker profile layout)
- "template-036": Case Study (discussion with statistics and conclusion)

Template element requirements:
- template-042 (Podcast): { "title": "", "subtitle": "", "hostImage": "", "hostName": "", "caption": "" }
- template-048 (Interview): { "title": "", "subtitle": "", "quote": "", "speaker": "" }
- template-031 (Expert Quote): { "quote": "", "author": "", "role": "" }
- template-039 (Profile Spotlight): { "name": "", "title": "", "description": "", "image": "" }
- template-036 (Case Study): { "title": "", "subtitle": "", "statistics": "", "conclusion": "" }

Populate the elements object according to the selected templateId.

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "title",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "duration": 10,
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "templateId": "template-042",
      "elements": {
        "title": "",
        "subtitle": "",
        "hostImage": "",
        "hostName": "",
        "caption": ""
      },
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
